arts.ttl: PSV star drops hint over move to Chelsea – Blues fan and fancies Premier League future
arts.sum: PSV Eindhoven striker Ricardo Pepi has been a shining light for the Dutch club this season and he has now expressed his admiration for Chelsea. The 22-year-old has scored ten times in the Eredivisie this season and has one Champions League goal to his name as well.
